doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by claiming tenants must vacate based solely on notice without court proceedings or cure rights, contrary to actual Illinois law and HUD guidance.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois tenant law by claiming tenants have no right to cure and must vacate based solely on a notice (contradicting actual Illinois law which requires court proceedings and provides cure rights), and falsely attributes this position to HUD and the Illinois Attorney General.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by claiming tenants must vacate based solely on notice without court proceedings or cure rights, contrary to actual Illinois law and HUD guidance.
